performance.notes: Set path-specific latency budgets per application.

pr_gates.requirement: Unit tests with >90% line and branch coverage.
pr_gates.suggested_command: Backend and frontend line coverage are enforced; repo-wide branch coverage remains tracked debt that still needs more tests.

pr_gates.requirement: Integration coverage for all declared integration boundaries.
pr_gates.suggested_command: Run the backend API and processing integration suites as a dedicated gate.

pr_gates.requirement: Real FFmpeg exports must decode fully and preserve subtitle geometry across the supported media matrix.
pr_gates.suggested_command: Run the deterministic real-media compatibility and golden-frame export gate.

pr_gates.requirement: Acceptance or E2E coverage for critical flows.
pr_gates.suggested_command: Add or confirm Playwright or equivalent acceptance coverage after human review of critical flows.
Run the repo-local architecture checker for cross-stack leaks and import cycles.

pr_gates.requirement: Zero critical or blocker static-analysis issues.
pr_gates.suggested_command: Run Ruff, ESLint, and frontend TypeScript type-checking.

pr_gates.requirement: Zero high or critical security issues.
pr_gates.suggested_command: Run Bandit, backend dependency audit in an isolated venv, and frontend npm audit.

pr_gates.requirement: The Java/Spring migration surface must build and pass unit, integration, and coverage checks under JDK 25.
pr_gates.suggested_command: Run a clean Maven verify against an isolated temporary PostgreSQL database through the JDK 25 resolver.

nightly_gates.requirement: Mutation kill rate above 95% for critical logic or the full repo where practical.
nightly_gates.suggested_command: Run PIT against the Java authentication and request-safety boundary under the nightly JDK 25 workflow.

nightly_gates.requirement: No more than 10% degradation on critical paths.
nightly_gates.suggested_command: Run the deterministic subtitle export performance smoke gate.

nightly_gates.requirement: No high or critical DAST findings on the deployable surface.
nightly_gates.suggested_command: Run OWASP ZAP only after a deployable preview target exists.

notes: Acceptance flows remain human-owned and should be confirmed in .codex/acceptance-flows.md.
Real-media export compatibility and golden-frame regression checks run locally without external providers.
Java/Spring enforcement is executable through check:java and CI configures JDK 25 plus PostgreSQL; local runs require both services.
Java PIT mutation testing covers the authentication and request-safety boundary; subtitle export performance smoke is also executable nightly.
DAST remains blocked until the repo has a stable deployable preview target for OWASP ZAP.

check:static.shell: ruff check backend && cd frontend && npm run lint && npm run lint:dead-code && npx tsc --noEmit

check:integration.shell: cd backend && APP_ENV=dev pytest -o addopts='' tests/test_auth.py tests/test_gcs_endpoints.py tests/test_jobs_and_videos.py tests/test_export_route_regressions.py tests/test_processing_task_helpers.py tests/test_validation_helpers.py

check:media-export.shell: cd backend && APP_ENV=dev GSP_MOCK_EXTERNAL_SERVICES=1 GSP_EXTERNAL_PROVIDER_MONTHLY_BUDGET_USD=0 GSP_EXTERNAL_PROVIDER_PER_REQUEST_BUDGET_USD=0 pytest -o addopts='' -m media_export tests/test_real_media_exports.py

check:security.shell: cd backend && rm -rf .audit-venv && python3 -m venv .audit-venv && . .audit-venv/bin/activate && python -m pip install --upgrade pip >/dev/null && pip install -r requirements.txt bandit pip-audit >/dev/null && bandit -r app -ll && pip-audit --local && deactivate && rm -rf .audit-venv && cd ../frontend && npm audit --audit-level=high

check:dast.message: DAST requires a stable deployable preview URL; no ZAP target is configured for this local-first repo yet.
